targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM users;
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM rides;
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM posts;
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM follows;
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '1d'), count(*) AS "yeni kullanıcı" FROM users WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '1d'), count(*) AS "sürüş" FROM rides WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '1d'), count(*) AS "paylaşım" FROM posts WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT u.name AS "kullanıcı", u.email, count(DISTINCT r.id) AS "sürüş", count(DISTINCT p.id) AS "paylaşım", round(coalesce(sum(DISTINCT r.distance),0)::numeric/1000, 1) AS "km" FROM users u LEFT JOIN rides r ON r.user_id = u.id AND $__timeFilter(r.created_at) LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.user_id = u.id AND $__timeFilter(p.created_at) GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email ORDER BY "sürüş" DESC, "paylaşım" DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT t.created_at AS "zaman", u.name AS "kullanıcı", t.eylem, t.detay FROM ( SELECT r.created_at, r.user_id, 'sürüş' AS eylem, ('mesafe ' || round((r.distance/1000)::numeric,1) || ' km') AS detay FROM rides r UNION ALL SELECT p.created_at, p.user_id, 'paylaşım' AS eylem, coalesce(p.location_name, p.caption, '') AS detay FROM posts p UNION ALL SELECT f.created_at, f.follower_id, 'takip' AS eylem, ('kullanıcı #' || f.followee_id || ' takip edildi') AS detay FROM follows f UNION ALL SELECT rw.awarded_at, rw.user_id, 'rozet' AS eylem, rw.type AS detay FROM rewards rw ) t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 100;
